info.title: Zucchina.Zix.Tool
info.description: A cross-platform command line tool to create MSIX packages and bundles.

commands.name: bundle
commands.description: Create a new MSIX bundle from a directory or a mapping file.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
The directory containing the packages to bundle.
(Required if --mapping is not specified)

options.name: --mapping
options.description:
The mapping file containing the list of packages to bundle.
(Required if --directory is not specified)

options.name: --auto-rename
options.description: Automatically rename packages to <package_full_name>.msix when adding them to the bundle. [default: False]

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Overwrite the destination file if it already exists. [default: False]

commands.name: get-publisher-hash
commands.description: Calculate the publisher hash from a certificate name.

arguments.name: publisher-name
arguments.description: The subject of the publisher's certificate.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Create a new MSIX package from a directory or a mapping file.

options.name: --directory
options.description: The directory containing the package's files. (Mutually exclusive with --mapping)

options.name: --mapping
options.description: The mapping file containing the package's file list. (Mutually exclusive with --directory)

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Overwrite the destination file if it already exists. [default: False]

commands.name: unpack
commands.description: Extract a MSIX package to a directory.

options.name: --directory
options.description: The directory to extract the package to.

options.name: --create-subdir
options.description: Create a subdirectory for the package named with the package's full name. [default: False]

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Delete and recreate the destination directory if it already exists. [default: False]
